title: Crispy Spanish Chili Stir-fry
description: A dairy-free-friendly weeknight dish featuring umami flavors and crispy textures from the use of chili and bake method.

ingredients.name: chili peppers
ingredients.notes: red or green, seeded if spicy is desired

ingredients.name: aubergine (eggplant)
ingredients.notes: washed and sliced into thin rounds

ingredients.name: baking soda
ingredients.amount: a pinch per 1 cup of beans for crispiness enhancer

ingredients.name: brown sugar
ingredients.notes: to add a natural sweetness that complements the chili and vegetables

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: minced for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: ginger root
ingredients.notes: grated or minced finely for umami boost

instructions: Combine baking soda and soy sauce in a mixing bowl. Add sliced aubergine, toss gently until coated evenly.
Spread the aubergine slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure they are not touching each other for crispy results.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden and crispy on both sides. Set aside to cool slightly.
In a separate pan over medium heat, sauté minced garlic and ginger in oil until fragrant but not browned.
Add the chili peppers (seeded if needed) to the pan with the vegetables, tossing them around for a few minutes until they start to soften.
Return the cooled aubergine slices to the pan. Add soy sauce, brown sugar, and remaining cooking liquid from baking pan in a jug.
Stir everything together well, ensuring all ingredients are evenly coated and heated through. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice or noodles for an additional meal option.
